title: Dysfunctional's Life in the Woods
description: Yet another attempt to make Minecraft more realistic and immersive, but not annoyingly.
body:
[![DLITWTitle](https://codeberg.org/DysfunctionalEntertainment/Assets/raw/branch/main/Images/Modpacks/Titles/DLITW.png)](https://modrinth.com/organization/dysfunctionalentertainment)

# About:
A pack all about slowing down the game and taking in the scenery. You'll have to diversify your nutrition, stay well hydrated, and watch your temperature all while exploring a revamped world. We kept it very vanilla+ with building and surviving being the focus of this pack you won't find many new structures but we have overhauled the old ones to keep things fresh. Make sure to install your favorite shader too as the world truly benefits from proper lighting.

# Pack Download:
For ease of use install a custom Minecraft launcher like the official [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/app) or [Prism Launcher](https://prismlauncher.org/). Using one of these will automatically manage and update your instance so it is recommended.

# Apex Hosting:
The best way to support our small teams projects is to purchase a server from [ApexHosting.](https://billing.apexminecrafthosting.com/aff.php?aff=8139)

![ApexBanner](https://cdn.apexminecrafthosting.com/img/theme/apex-hosting-mobile.png)
